item.title: 【高校入試での痴漢対策、私服受験も可能に】 文部科学省は、高校入試での受験生の安全確保などに関する通知を全国の教育委員…
item.author: 産経ニュース (@sankei.com)
item.description:
【高校入試での痴漢対策、私服受験も可能に】

文部科学省は、高校入試での受験生の安全確保などに関する通知を全国の教育委員会などに出した。
痴漢対策として「被害について不安に思われる受験生や保護者がいる場合は、地域の実情等を勘案し、試験当日の服装について、私服での受験も可能とする」と初めて例示した。受験生への痴漢は主に大学入試で問題になっている。遅刻できないため警察に通報されないだろうと考えての犯行とされる。
item.content:encoded:
【高校入試での痴漢対策、私服受験も可能に】

文部科学省は、高校入試での受験生の安全確保などに関する通知を全国の教育委員会などに出した。
痴漢対策として「被害について不安に思われる受験生や保護者がいる場合は、地域の実情等を勘案し、試験当日の服装について、私服での受験も可能とする」と初めて例示した。受験生への痴漢は主に大学入試で問題になっている。遅刻できないため警察に通報されないだろうと考えての犯行とされる。

item.title: トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢 ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじ…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢

ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじゃないね。

#家庭菜園

item.title: トヨタ系、免許返納者の買い物送迎サービス参入 秋に大阪で実証実験 www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZ…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
トヨタ系、免許返納者の買い物送迎サービス参入　秋に大阪で実証実験
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

自宅と食品スーパー間の送迎サービスを始めます。

スマホアプリや電話で予約して利用する仕組みで、運賃はタクシーよりも安価になる見通し。

年内に全国で事業化します。
item.content:encoded:
トヨタ系、免許返納者の買い物送迎サービス参入　秋に大阪で実証実験
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

自宅と食品スーパー間の送迎サービスを始めます。

スマホアプリや電話で予約して利用する仕組みで、運賃はタクシーよりも安価になる見通し。

年内に全国で事業化します。

item.title: Six years and almost $1 billion in taxpayer dollars later, t…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)

item.description:
長谷川慎×古屋呂敏のW主演ドラマ「恋をするなら二度目が上等 season2」が放送決定

舞台は前作から2年後。ドラマオリジナルのストーリーに。ファンミーティングも開催
https://natalie.mu/eiga/news/679722?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

item.title: おはようございます。 今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･) ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦…
item.author: 風祭 史紀 (かざまつり しき) (@kazamaturisiki.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます。
今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･)

ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦)
（かわいいイラストありがとうございます！）
今の願い事はこれしかないかな……(人－ω－) かないますように……
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます。
今日は七夕か～(・｀ω´･)

ということで、ショー☆イマダさんのイラストをお借りしました(≧∇≦)
（かわいいイラストありがとうございます！）
今の願い事はこれしかないかな……(人－ω－) かないますように……

item.title: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appea…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appear in poetry. Pianist Mal Waldron did, immortalized in Frank O'Hara's The Day Lady Died. His remarkable story extends far beyond that final line.
item.content:encoded: Jazz musicians are often called poets, but they rarely appear in poetry. Pianist Mal Waldron did, immortalized in Frank O'Hara's The Day Lady Died. His remarkable story extends far beyond that final line.

item.title: NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used an address where he did not live while voting in six elections in the past two years — despite warning voters that “it is illegal to misrepresent your residence on election records.”

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton appears to have used an address where he did not live while voting in six elections in the past two years — despite warning voters that “it is illegal to misrepresent your residence on election records.”

with @texastribune.org

item.title: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...
item.content:encoded: An Afghan national who fought alongside U.S. forces has died from an allergic reaction while in ICE custody, one day after he was detained for deportation proceedings, his death certificate shows. www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news...

item.title: Recently the island of Mousa became home to Shetland ponies …
item.author: Catherine Munro (@catherinemmunro.bsky.social)
item.description: Recently the island of Mousa became home to Shetland ponies once again again. It is a joy to see the next generation of these beautiful horses standing by the iconic Mousa broch #Shetland
item.content:encoded: Recently the island of Mousa became home to Shetland ponies once again again. It is a joy to see the next generation of these beautiful horses standing by the iconic Mousa broch #Shetland

item.title: Here's a triple play for theme day - #BlueSkyTuesday, #Twosd…
item.author: Tramonte's TrailPhotos (@tramontes-t-photos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Here's a triple play for theme day - #BlueSkyTuesday, #Twosday for the two peaks of Mt. Diablo in the distance, and #RockinTuesday. Taken from Morgan Territory open space looking back towards Mt. Diablo near Clayton, #California.

#ECK #hiking #landscapephotography #nature #mountains #WestCoastKin
item.content:encoded:
Here's a triple play for theme day - #BlueSkyTuesday, #Twosday for the two peaks of Mt. Diablo in the distance, and #RockinTuesday. Taken from Morgan Territory open space looking back towards Mt. Diablo near Clayton, #California.

#ECK #hiking #landscapephotography #nature #mountains #WestCoastKin

item.title: キキョウ 青く星形のお花が咲いていました✨️ 秋の七草とも呼ばれるうちの1つ 「おすきなふくは」 と7つ覚え方があ…

青く星形のお花が咲いていました✨️
秋の七草とも呼ばれるうちの1つ

「おすきなふくは」

と7つ覚え方があるみたい
1つずつ探してみるのも面白いかもしれません☺️

キキョウ

青く星形のお花が咲いていました✨️
秋の七草とも呼ばれるうちの1つ

と7つ覚え方があるみたい
1つずつ探してみるのも面白いかもしれません☺️

item.title: The head of FIFA should have said no The coach should have …
item.author: MamaSass (@mamasass.bsky.social)
item.description:
The head of FIFA should have said no

The coach should have said no

The player should have said no

But most of all, the question should not have been asked.
item.content:encoded:
The head of FIFA should have said no

The coach should have said no

The player should have said no

But most of all, the question should not have been asked.

item.title: Progressive senator Bernie Sanders has called on Graham Plat…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: Progressive senator Bernie Sanders has called on Graham Platner to withdraw from the US Senate race in Maine, citing “very serious allegations” of sexual assault.
item.content:encoded: Progressive senator Bernie Sanders has called on Graham Platner to withdraw from the US Senate race in Maine, citing “very serious allegations” of sexual assault.

item.author: Bodega Cats (@bodegacats.bsky.social)

item.title: America didn’t just lose a World Cup match. We lost credibi…
item.author: Dr. Mar (@boldnewme.bsky.social)
item.description:
America didn’t just lose a World Cup match.

We lost credibility.

A President personally intervened with FIFA over a disciplinary decision and created the appearance that political power could influence the rules of the game.

The reputational cost was far greater than the sporting cost.
item.content:encoded:
America didn’t just lose a World Cup match.

We lost credibility.

A President personally intervened with FIFA over a disciplinary decision and created the appearance that political power could influence the rules of the game.

The reputational cost was far greater than the sporting cost.

item.title: A street in Italy.
item.author: Karen Sue Waters (@karensuew.bsky.social)
item.description: A street in Italy.
item.content:encoded: A street in Italy.

item.title: The Democratic Party must reckon with how it continued to su…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: The Democratic Party must reckon with how it continued to support an abusive man and prop up a system that allows those in power to skirt responsibility and actively harm survivors.
item.content:encoded: The Democratic Party must reckon with how it continued to support an abusive man and prop up a system that allows those in power to skirt responsibility and actively harm survivors.
